problem.title: Edit Distance
problem.description: Given two strings word1 and word2, return the minimum number of operations required to convert word1 to word2. You have the following three operations permitted on a word: Insert a character, Delete a character, Replace a character.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Build a 2D DP table where dp[i][j] is the minimum edits to convert the first i characters of word1 into the first j characters of word2. If the current characters match, no additional edit is needed (dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1]); otherwise take the minimum of insert, delete, or replace and add 1. Base cases fill the first row and column with incremental deletion/insertion costs.
